CREATE TABLE test_tinyint (id TINYINT, value TINYINT);
SELECT * FROM test_tinyint WHERE id BETWEEN -127 AND 127;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_tinyint WHERE value < -128 OR value > 127;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_tinyint WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_tinyint WHERE value > 0);
CREATE TABLE test_tinyint_2 (id TINYINT, value TINYINT, foreign_id TINYINT);
INSERT INTO test_tinyint_2 (id, value, foreign_id) VALUES (1, 20, -1), (2, 30, 1), (3, -5, 0);
SELECT a.id, a.value FROM test_tinyint a JOIN test_tinyint_2 b ON a.id = b.foreign_id WHERE b.value > -10;
SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_tinyint WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT a.value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_tinyint_2 WHERE value < a.value) AS less_count FROM test_tinyint a WHERE a.value BETWEEN -127 AND 127;
UPDATE test_tinyint SET value = 100 WHERE id = 1;
